boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on consent-status class
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-BOR-082 states consent C12 remains pending

final_answer: Source records indicate activation authority covers site, protocol, and date, but consent C12 remains pending per AUTH-BOR-082. The policy requires a closed consent-status class before enrollment. The boundary remains open due to the unresolved abstract consent field, necessitating escalation for verification.
